languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

languages.text: "Чем тебя удивляет мое желание избавиться от тебя как можно скорее?" {n}Голос некрона звучит ровно, надменно и... фальшиво. Словно, произнося слова, ксенос сдерживает злобную усмешку, окрашивающую его тон в ядовитые цвета.{/n}

"What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Чем тебя удивляет мое желание избавиться от тебя как можно скорее?" {n}Голос некрона звучит ровно, надменно и... фальшиво. Словно, произнося слова, ксенос сдерживает злобную усмешку, окрашивающую его тон в ядовитые цвета.{/n}

"What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Qué hay de sorprendente en mi deseo de librarme de ti cuanto antes?». {n}La voz del Necrón es uniforme, arrogante y... totalmente falsa, como si estuviera conteniendo una sonrisa malévola que imprime ácido a sus palabras.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué hay de sorprendente en mi deseo de librarme de ti cuanto antes?». {n}La voz del Necrón es uniforme, arrogante y... totalmente falsa, como si estuviera conteniendo una sonrisa malévola que imprime ácido a sus palabras.{/n}

languages.text: “我想尽快把你打发走，这有什么好奇怪的？”{n}太空死灵的声音平静而傲慢，而且……虚伪至极。他仿佛在强压着一丝恶毒的讥笑，那笑意让他吐出的每个字都浸满了刻薄。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我想尽快把你打发走，这有什么好奇怪的？”{n}太空死灵的声音平静而傲慢，而且……虚伪至极。他仿佛在强压着一丝恶毒的讥笑，那笑意让他吐出的每个字都浸满了刻薄。{/n}

languages.text: « Est-il vraiment surprenant que je désire me débarrasser de vous au plus vite ? » {n}demande le Nécron d'une voix calme et arrogante... qui sonne totalement faux, comme s'il réprimait un sourire malintentionné imprégnant d'acide chacun de ses mots.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Est-il vraiment surprenant que je désire me débarrasser de vous au plus vite ? » {n}demande le Nécron d'une voix calme et arrogante... qui sonne totalement faux, comme s'il réprimait un sourire malintentionné imprégnant d'acide chacun de ses mots.{/n}

languages.text: "Senden bir an önce kurtulma arzumun nesi bu kadar şaşırtıcı?" {n}Nekron'un sesi pürüzsüz, kibirli ve... Bütünüyle sahte. Sanki kelimelerinin ta içine asit aşılayan kötü niyetli bir sırıtışı bastırıyormuş gibi konuşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Senden bir an önce kurtulma arzumun nesi bu kadar şaşırtıcı?" {n}Nekron'un sesi pürüzsüz, kibirli ve... Bütünüyle sahte. Sanki kelimelerinin ta içine asit aşılayan kötü niyetli bir sırıtışı bastırıyormuş gibi konuşuyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was ist so überraschend an meinem Wunsch, dich so schnell wie möglich loszuwerden?" {n}Die Stimme des Necrons ist ausgeglichen, arrogant und ... gänzlich unaufrichtig. Es ist, als würde er ein boshaften Grinsen unterdrücken, das jedes seiner Worte mit Säure versetzt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was ist so überraschend an meinem Wunsch, dich so schnell wie möglich loszuwerden?" {n}Die Stimme des Necrons ist ausgeglichen, arrogant und ... gänzlich unaufrichtig. Es ist, als würde er ein boshaften Grinsen unterdrücken, das jedes seiner Worte mit Säure versetzt.{/n}

languages.text: 「早くお前をこの世から消したいという私の願いに、何が驚くのか？」{n}ネクロンの声は平然として傲慢で…そして全く嘘っぽく、まるで悪意に満ちたニヤリと笑うのを抑えているかのように、彼の言葉は毒を帯びている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even, arrogant, and... utterly false. As if he is suppressing a malevolent smirk that imbues his very words with acid.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「早くお前をこの世から消したいという私の願いに、何が驚くのか？」{n}ネクロンの声は平然として傲慢で…そして全く嘘っぽく、まるで悪意に満ちたニヤリと笑うのを抑えているかのように、彼の言葉は毒を帯びている。{/n}
